Name: CHR_ROUND_DAMAGE_PARAM
Description: Defines scaling multipliers for damage, stamina drain, and stun effects across multiple New Game cycles (NG+ rounds), including both outgoing and incoming effects.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 1: Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Player damage scaling for the first playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 1: Stamina Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Amount of stamina drained from enemies in the first cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 1: Stun Accumulation Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Stun buildup effectiveness in the first cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 2: Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Player damage scaling for the second playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 2: Stamina Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Stamina damage dealt to enemies in the second cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 2: Stun Accumulation Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Stun buildup effectiveness in the second cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 3: Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Player damage scaling for the third playthrough cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 3: Stamina Damage Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Stamina damage dealt to enemies in the third cycle.

Fields.Name: New Game Cycle 3: Stun Accumulation Multiplier [%]
Fields.Description: Stun buildup effectiveness in the third cycle.

Fields.Description: Multiplier for stun buildup received from enemies in cycle 1.
